name: Banana Squares
recipeIngredient: Sour milk (1/4 cup, made with 1 tsp white vinegar and enough milk to equal 1/4 cup)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat egg whites until soft peaks form; set aside.
2. Cream shortening and sugar in a large bowl until light and fluffy.
3. Add egg yolks, then mix well.
4. Fold in mashed bananas.
5. In a separate bowl, combine flour and baking soda; add to the creamed mixture alternately with sour milk, beating well after each addition.
6. Stir in vanilla extract.
7. Gently fold in the egg whites.
8. If using, stir in chopped walnuts.
9. Pour batter into a greased 13x9x2 inch baking pan.
10. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45-50 minutes.
11. Cool on a wire rack.
12. Garnish with whipped cream and banana slices if desired.
